node.statement: EXACT E4 (Sphere single-particle basis): Spinor coords u=cos(theta/2)e^{i*phi/2}, v=sin(theta/2)e^{-i*phi/2}. Orthonormal LLL basis: e_{S,m} = sqrt((2S+1)/(4pi) * C(2S,S+m)) * u^{S+m} * v^{S-m}, m=-S,...,S. Angular momentum: L_3*e_{S,m}=hbar*m*e_{S,m}, |L|^2 = hbar^2*S(S+1). These are monopole harmonics (Dirac-Wu-Yang). [P04-Fano eqs (16),(21),(22); P01-Haldane p.606]
